ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for each country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of each country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of each country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_bednights" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly statistic entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the statistics */,
  "bednights" REAL /* Number of bednights */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_bednights_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-2 code for each region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotel_brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel brand */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the brand is based */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the hotel brand */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year when the hotel brand was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotel_brands_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotel_statistics" (
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the hotel */,
  "hotel_name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hotel */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the hotel (1-5 stars) */,
  "bednight_count" INTEGER /* Total bednights recorded for the hotel */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotel_statistics_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES hotel_brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tourism_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the report */,
  "report_year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_category" TEXT /* Category of the report (annual, quarterly) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Detailed data or analysis included in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tourism_reports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for account security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasonal_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seasonal trend entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the trend applies to */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (high season, low season) */,
  "high_season_start" TEXT /* Start date of the high season */,
  "high_season_end" TEXT /* End date of the high season */,
  "low_season_start" TEXT /* Start date of the low season */,
  "low_season_end" TEXT /* End date of the low season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasonal_trends_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tourism_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecast_year" INTEGER /* Year of the forecast */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (annual, quarterly) */,
  "predicted_bednights" INTEGER /* Predicted number of bednights for that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tourism_forecasts_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
